findings.message: Cache should be cleaned after package installation. Package manager cache should be removed to reduce Docker image size. Use 'apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*' for apt, 'yum clean all' for yum, 'dnf clean all' for dnf, or '--no-cache' flag for apk.

Consent flag should be set to avoid manual input. Package manager commands should include consent flags to enable non-interactive execution. Use '-n' or '--non-interactive' for gdebi, '-y' for apt/apt-get/yum/dnf, '--non-interactive' for zypper, or '--noconfirm' for pacman.
The MAINTAINER instruction is deprecated. Use LABEL maintainer="email@example.com" instead to specify the image maintainer.
